isi.albums: Persona X Aylah (The Ugly Wife of the Shady Duke OST)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Aylah - Persona

Romanization

useupji cham
nugungga
geuryeonoeun gwejeogeul ttara
himgyeopge georeo
nae bal kkeuti heoreo

gyeou nal majuhaesseulttae
al su isseosseo
heundeullinggeon numbichi anira
maeuminggeol

I don't need to tell you
nan eotteon saraminji
I don't want to lose myself

eolgureul garyeo
nae pyojeongeul gamchwo
naega anin naro
saragaya halteni

nal ireosseulttae
nado nareul beorilttae
Don’t tell me
Don’t tell me
mitji mothan chaero


sumjugyeo isseul ppuniya
ije seumyeodeureosseul ppuniya
bukkeureopji ana
geojimmareun anhae

geujeo mari eomneungge
maeumeul sumgineun jjogi
deo pyeonhae
deulkiji anado dwae

iyuga eomneun salmeul
beotyeonaeya haltenikka
mandeureo dun pinggye majeo
bolpumi eopseunikka

eolgureul garyeo
nae pyojeongeul gamchwo
naega anin naro
saragaya haltenikka

nal ireosseulttae
nado nareul beorilttae
gatjaneun wiseon dwie
naranhi
gamyeoneul sseo nan oneuldo

Ye
garyeojin goseseo
jinjja nailtenikka

misoman jinneun
geojitdoen salmeul sara
da ttokgateul tenikka

japgo sipeulttae
na jochado miulttae
gatjaneun wiseon dwie
deoisang sumji aneulkke

Hangeul

우습지 참
누군가
그려놓은 궤적을 따라
힘겹게 걸어
내 발 끝이 헐어

겨우 날 마주했을때
알 수 있었어
흔들린건 눈빛이 아니라
마음인걸

I don't need to tell you
난 어떤 사람인지
I don't want to lose myself

얼굴을 가려
내 표정을 감춰
내가 아닌 나로
살아가야 할테니

날 잃었을때
나도 나를 버릴때
Don’t tell me
Don’t tell me
믿지 못한 채로


숨죽여 있을 뿐이야
이제 스며들었을 뿐이야
부끄럽지 않아
거짓말은 안해

그저 말이 없는게
마음을 숨기는 쪽이
더 편해
들키지 않아도 돼

이유가 없는 삶을
버텨내야 할테니까
만들어 둔 핑계 마저
볼품이 없으니까

얼굴을 가려
내 표정을 감춰
내가 아닌 나로
살아가야 할테니까

날 잃었을때
나도 나를 버릴때
같잖은 위선 뒤에
나란히
가면을 써 난 오늘도

Ye
가려진 곳에서
진짜 나일테니까

미소만 짓는
거짓된 삶을 살아
다 똑같을 테니까

잡고 싶을때
나 조차도 미울때
같잖은 위선 뒤에
더이상 숨지 않을께

isi.lyrics:
Lyric yejun - Lost Again

Romanization

Feel like a daydream
nan ajik seommyeonghae

neoui heart stream
aneseo meomchwo isseo nan

nan ajik jamgyeoisseo
(All right)

ijen deo isang
nan neoreul gamchuji mothae
(geuttaero doragandaneun ge)

I'm going crazy
Lost in your eyes, can't break away

manggajin may day
machanggaji way back

gipge beonjin heunjeok kkeute
nan imi Too late
No matter what I say

nan gireul ireo
neol chaja Lost Again

kkeuteun jal mollado
I'm fallin' once again

doedoragago sipeo
ijen take me back

Back Back Back

Still I remember
geunarui moksori

I can't forget you
ajik geogi isseo

I call out your name
tto daedap eomneun

We We won't be 'Lost Again'

I'm thinkin' 'bout nan Stupid boy
da ilgo naseo jinjjaga boyeo

neon neul useotgo
nan domanggasseo
geuge meosin jul aldeon
déjà vuya

dolgo dora nan fallin' in love
ulgo bulmyeo nan wait it neo

L-O-V-E
han geuljado nan moreugesseo

ijeneun jeongmal nege amureon maldo mot hae
doragagien neomu neujeobeorin
uriga doen geoya

manggajin may day
machanggaji way back

gipge beonjin heunjeok kkeute
nan imi Too late
No matter what I say

nan gireul ireo
neol chaja Lost Again

kkeuteun jal mollado
I'm fallin' once again

doedoragago sipeo
ijen take me back

Back Back Back

Still I remember
geunarui moksori

I can't forget you
ajik geogi isseo

I call out your name
tto daedap eomneun

We We won't be 'Lost Again'

Hangeul

Feel like a daydream
난 아직 선명해

너의 heart stream
안에서 멈춰 있어 난

난 아직 잠겨있어
(All right)

이젠 더 이상
난 너를 감추지 못해
(그때로 돌아간다는 게)

I'm going crazy
Lost in your eyes, can't break away

망가진 may day
마찬가지 way back

깊게 번진 흔적 끝에
난 이미 Too late
No matter what I say

난 길을 잃어
널 찾아 Lost Again

끝은 잘 몰라도
I'm fallin' once again

되돌아가고 싶어
이젠 take me back

Back Back Back

Still I remember
그날의 목소리

I can't forget you
아직 거기 있어

I call out your name
또 대답 없는

We We won't be 'Lost Again'

I'm thinkin' 'bout 난 Stupid boy
다 잃고 나서 진짜가 보여

넌 늘 웃었고
난 도망갔어
그게 멋인 줄 알던
déjà vu야

돌고 돌아 난 fallin' in love
울고 불며 난 wait it 너

L-O-V-E
한 글자도 난 모르겠어

이제는 정말 네게 아무런 말도 못 해
돌아가기엔 너무 늦어버린
우리가 된 거야

망가진 may day
마찬가지 way back

깊게 번진 흔적 끝에
난 이미 Too late
No matter what I say

난 길을 잃어
널 찾아 Lost Again

끝은 잘 몰라도

되돌아가고 싶어
이젠 take me back

Back Back Back

I call out your name
또 대답 없는

We We won't be 'Lost Again'

isi.driveFileNames: Yaeyung. Kang & Rums & 이엘리 - 산타가 와 (Santa is Coming).mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Yaeyung. Kang & Rums & 이엘리 - 산타가 와 (Santa is Coming)

Romanization

santaga ondaneunde, naegedo olkkana
seommul ssain georie, nae geotdo isseullana

dadeul sikkeulbeokjeokhae , mwoga geuri gippeungga
na gateun oetoriege santaga wajuryeona

cheoeumen ppalgan jibe
geudaeumen noran jibe
geurigoneun uri jibe
wajumyeon cham joeultende

Don’t worry
Hold on
santaharabeojin moduege
seommureul jusindae
an bitnaneun sarameun eopdae yeah -

changgae gidaeeo saljjak (saljjak)
nune seumyeodeun gidaeneun banjjak (banjjak)
Even when you feel alone
a light will find your way

olhaedo tto santaga olkka (Santa is coming)
kkaman bame olhaedo wonhaetdeon seommureul gajyeoda jusilkka
bamhaneul wie geuryeonoeun wish list
jageun sowon hanarado nochiji anneun geu big gift
Everybody talkin’ ‘bout Santa, but listen
There’s a little light already shining in your day

honjarago neukkilttae (give me that give me that)
geu sungganedo kyeojyeo isseo neo mollae neomanui byeoldo
nugujipbuteo gasseulkka jeil bitnaneun jip check list kkeute sseoisseo
You’re the one that shines

cheoeumen ppalgan jibe
geudaeumen noran jibe
geurigoneun uri jibe
wajumyeon cham joeultende

Don’t worry
Hold on
santaharabeojin moduege
seommureul jusindae
an bitnaneun sarameun eopdae yeah -

Don’t worry
Hold on
santaharabeojin moduege
seommureul jusindae
an bitnaneun sarameun eopdae yeah -

Hangeul

산타가 온다는데, 나에게도 올까나
선물 쌓인 거리에, 내 것도 있을라나

다들 시끌벅적해 , 뭐가 그리 기쁜가
나 같은 외톨이에게 산타가 와주려나

처음엔 빨간 집에
그다음엔 노란 집에
그리고는 우리 집에
와주면 참 좋을텐데

Don’t worry
Hold on
산타할아버진 모두에게
선물을 주신대
안 빛나는 사람은 없대 yeah -

창가에 기대어 살짝 (살짝)
눈에 스며든 기대는 반짝 (반짝)
Even when you feel alone
a light will find your way

올해도 또 산타가 올까 (Santa is coming)
까만 밤에 올해도 원했던 선물을 가져다 주실까
밤하늘 위에 그려놓은 wish list
작은 소원 하나라도 놓치지 않는 그 big gift
Everybody talkin’ ‘bout Santa, but listen
There’s a little light already shining in your day

혼자라고 느낄때 (give me that give me that)
그 순간에도 켜져 있어 너 몰래 너만의 별도
누구집부터 갔을까 제일 빛나는 집 check list 끝에 써있어
You’re the one that shines

처음엔 빨간 집에
그다음엔 노란 집에
그리고는 우리 집에
와주면 참 좋을텐데

Don’t worry
Hold on
산타할아버진 모두에게
선물을 주신대
안 빛나는 사람은 없대 yeah -

Don’t worry
Hold on
산타할아버진 모두에게
선물을 주신대
안 빛나는 사람은 없대 yeah -

isi.lyrics:
Lyric AXN - PASSWORD (Feat. M1NU)

Romanization

﻿Under the sky
eodum sok
nareul ilkkaeudeon bam

Eyes with the light
gipeun jameseo
kkaeeonallae

hollaneul majuhamyeo bitna
kkeuteomneun yeoljeong soge keep mind

Everyday neul
saenggakhae

Makin’ a history
sseonaeryeoga

Don’t forget my vibe
(deo saegyeojil ireum)

Don’t worry just type

Tell me your password code

I wanna
Break the code

Don’t lose myself
I can show you the perfect
Just wait me

I wanna
Break the code
Come feel me right now

You’re hypnotized
Give me all

Tell your password

Tell your password

Tell your password

I was locked in, made my own prison
Inside my head, whisperin’ bro you fallin’
geoure bichin nae moseubeun like foggin’
jap saenggagi neom mana dolgo dora dasi morning

Turned every setback to ammo, load it straight in my brain like Rambo
gireul ireotgo nan pyeolchyeonne jido
geurigo dasi modu RESET da itgiro

Now I’m givin’ them a shock
They pushin’ me down
na ijeneun geunyang danghaejuji ana

gwageoro doragamyeon neomu manido sogatji
ije waseo kkaedarasseo nan ije hyeonsire sareo

Pressure, lots of stress
nae eokkaeen han jibani
geuraeseo nae du nuneun jeoldae motgameo

Leavin’ cracks in the mirror
Test my limit, now I’m looking for chedda

Don’t forget my vibe
(deo saegyeojil ireum)

Don’t worry just type

Tell me your password code

I wanna
Break the code

Don’t lose myself
I can show you the perfect
Just wait me

I wanna
Break the code
Come feel me right now

You’re hypnotized
Give me all

Tell your password

Tell your password

Tell your password

Tell your password


Hangeul

﻿Under the sky
어둠 속
나를 일깨우던 밤

Eyes with the light
깊은 잠에서
깨어날래

혼란을 마주하며 빛나
끝없는 열정 속에 keep mind

Everyday 늘
생각해

Makin’ a history
써내려가

Don’t forget my vibe
(더 새겨질 이름)

Don’t worry just type

Tell me your password code

I wanna
Break the code

Don’t lose myself
I can show you the perfect
Just wait me

I wanna
Break the code
Come feel me right now

You’re hypnotized
Give me all

Tell your password

Tell your password

Tell your password

I was locked in, made my own prison
Inside my head, whisperin’ bro you fallin’
거울에 비친 내 모습은 like foggin’
잡 생각이 넘 많아 돌고 돌아 다시 morning

Turned every setback to ammo, load it straight in my brain like Rambo
길을 잃었고 난 펼쳤네 지도
그리고 다시 모두 RESET 다 잊기로

Now I’m givin’ them a shock
They pushin’ me down
나 이제는 그냥 당해주지 않아

과거로 돌아가면 너무 많이도 속았지
이제 와서 깨달았어 난 이제 현실에 살어

Pressure, lots of stress
내 어깨엔 한 집안이
그래서 내 두 눈은 절대 못감어

Leavin’ cracks in the mirror
Test my limit, now I’m looking for chedda

Don’t forget my vibe

Don’t worry just type

I wanna

isi.lyrics:
Lyric heyden - Star Town

Romanization

Stars falling down
from the sky in a lovely town
And the waves don’t make a sound
as the moonlight hits the ground
I was lost, but I was found
walking barefoot through the grass
by the waves that sang around
that bright and lovely town

stars everywhere, lighting up the coast
I forgot all my problems, I don’t even know my name
I found a perfect town for us
The only thing I need is you
Have you ever seen this many
stars before?
(l don’t think so)

Stars falling down
from the sky in a lovely town
And the waves don’t make a sound
as the moonlight hits the ground
I was lost, but I was found
walking barefoot through the grass
by the waves that sang around
that bright and lovely town

birds everywhere, singing by the coast
forget all your problems
You don’t need to know your name (know your name)
There is no stress in this town
green, blue, pink, and yellow skies for you (just for you)
This could be our little wonderland

Stars falling down
from the sky in a lovely town

as the moonlight hits the ground

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Thmoon - 강아지 (doggy)

Romanization

kkamppak jamdeun sai neoneun jongil uulhaetgo
naneun joeun kkumeul kkwo
jamkkan han nun palgo olge neoneun yeogieseo
chakhage gidaryeojullae

nummureul dwijibeosseun horangiga mareul geone
seulpeumeul dwijibeosseun gangajiga chumeul chune

eoullineun mareul kkeonaegineun eojeedo
oneuldo eoryeopgiman hae
jamkkan han nun gamneun sai neoneun domanggatgo
heukbari eojireophine

seulpeumeul dwijibeosseun gangajiga beoryeojine
nummureul dwijibeosseun horangiga sarajine

binjibe beoryeojin jageun uija hana
anneun iga hana eopdae
araero gudeobeorin sigeun nae eolgureul bwa
bore buteun meonjireul tte

nummureul dwijibeosseun horangiga chumeul chune
seulpeumeul dwijibeosseun gangajiga chumeul chune

dasi jinjihaejin nega naege mureobwado
naneun amu daedabeul hae
him ppajin sarangeul chatgo sipeun negeneun
hal mari eopseojine

useumi teojyeobeorin horangiga chumeul chune
nummuri teojyeobeorin gangajiga chumeul chune



Hangeul

깜빡 잠든 사이 너는 종일 우울했고
나는 좋은 꿈을 꿔
잠깐 한 눈 팔고 올게 너는 여기에서
착하게 기다려줄래

눈물을 뒤집어쓴 호랑이가 말을 거네
슬픔을 뒤집어쓴 강아지가 춤을 추네

어울리는 말을 꺼내기는 어제에도
오늘도 어렵기만 해
잠깐 한 눈 감는 사이 너는 도망갔고
흙발이 어지럽히네

슬픔을 뒤집어쓴 강아지가 버려지네
눈물을 뒤집어쓴 호랑이가 사라지네

빈집에 버려진 작은 의자 하나
앉는 이가 하나 없대
아래로 굳어버린 식은 내 얼굴을 봐
볼에 붙은 먼지를 떼

눈물을 뒤집어쓴 호랑이가 춤을 추네
슬픔을 뒤집어쓴 강아지가 춤을 추네

다시 진지해진 네가 내게 물어봐도
나는 아무 대답을 해
힘 빠진 사랑을 찾고 싶은 네게는
할 말이 없어지네

웃음이 터져버린 호랑이가 춤을 추네
눈물이 터져버린 강아지가 춤을 추네

isi.lyrics:
Lyric flow blow - from within

Romanization

Didn’t know what would terrify
Not falling fast in love, not dying
Till I met, Until I met you
Oh all my peace, just broke
I wanna stop this fire yet you still fuel it
Toxic feelin’ so deep
Don't care 'bout fitting in
No need for better fit
Tell me you felt the same way I did
Tell me you’re not just scared of it
Flowing till I belong
Drift with the tide and find our role
Once more

I know you’re exhausted
You had it the hardest
Fear grow from within
Is it weighing on you

I know you’re not sleeping
You’ve been the purest
Cracks start from within
Is it weighing on you

Hangeul
